arbiter.rationale: The audit supports classification of empty-prompt fallback after broad exception handling as an OUT_OF_SCOPE high-risk anti-pattern. The behavior removes required system instructions during an error path and must not advance as an adoptable design.

governor.rationale: Mandatory Apache-2.0 Governor review is complete for the governance disposition. This approval does not approve the fail-open mechanism and authorizes no Strix prompt, source, payload, exploit, media, documentation expression, or implementation reuse. Any unrelated future adaptation still requires separate Apache-2.0 notice, NOTICE, attribution, patent, distribution, and dependency review.

steward.rationale: Returning an empty system prompt after rendering failure conflicts with Orchestra fail-closed governance and safety requirements. The finding may be retained only as a prohibited-behavior lesson supporting deterministic failure, typed errors, validation, observability, and explicit safe termination.

maintainer_decision.rationale: Reject the fail-open prompt-rendering mechanism and block implementation. Preserve the finding only as a negative safety lesson requiring prompt construction to fail closed, emit a typed auditable error, prevent agent execution, and avoid silently removing system authority or policy instructions.
